mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: No printer enrollment methods found in this batch. This batch contains helper modules for HPID authentication, landing page, OSS emulator, overview page, and print history page operations. Printer enrollment methods likely exist in enrollment helper or printer setup helper files in different batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription state verification methods found in this batch. Methods to verify or set subscription free months status likely exist in subscription helper or API helper files in different batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods found in this batch. Methods to verify or set subscription status likely exist in subscription helper or API helper files in different batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: No pause plan methods found in this batch. Methods to pause a plan via CIT modal or Pause Instant Ink link likely exist in plan management helper or overview page helper files in different batches. The overview_helper.py in this batch does not contain pause plan methods.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Verifies that selecting a previous billing cycle changes the period title to not contain 'Current'. Creates a PrintHistoryPage instance. Clicks the billing_cycle_option dropdown to open it. Clicks the select_1_option to select the first previous billing cycle. Uses expect().not_to_contain_text() to verify that the billing_cycle_period_title does not contain the text 'Current', confirming that a previous period was selected.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Steps 2 and 5 verify the Billing Cycle Period card display. This method verifies billing cycle period selection and title changes, which is relevant to verifying the billing cycle period card state before and after the 32-day time shift.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Selects a specific billing cycle period by index from the dropdown. Creates a PrintHistoryPage instance. Clicks the billing_cycle_option dropdown to open it. Uses conditional logic to click the appropriate option based on period_index: if 1, clicks select_1_option; if 2, clicks select_2_option; if 3, clicks select_3_option. Uses expect() to verify the print_history_table_button is visible with a 10-second timeout, confirming the table updated.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Steps 2 and 5 involve checking the Billing Cycle Period card. This method allows selecting specific billing cycle periods, which may be needed to navigate to the correct billing period for verification.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Verifies that the billing table displays the expected total pages printed. Creates a PrintHistoryPage instance. Gets the inner text of the total_pages_printed element. Extracts numbers from the text using common.extract_numbers_from_text(). Asserts that the first extracted number matches the expected total_pages_printed parameter.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Step 19 verifies the total pages printed info displays the correct number (15 pages in the example). This method directly validates the total pages printed value displayed in the billing table.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Verifies all billing section fields against expected values from a dictionary. Creates a PrintHistoryPage instance. For each field in the expected_values dictionary (total_pages_printed, pages, rollover, additional, plan_price, overage_price, previous, charges, tax, total), performs validation by extracting numbers or validating currency values. This comprehensive method validates all billing section details in a single call.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Steps 8, 11, 14, 18, and 19 verify various page count values (complimentary pages, additional pages, total pages). This comprehensive method can verify all billing section fields including page counts, which is highly relevant for validating the billing cycle period card data.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Validates all FAQ questions and links on the print and payment history page by clicking questions, verifying answers, and testing navigation links. Creates instances of PrintHistoryPage, OverviewPage, UpdatePlanPage, and DashboardSideMenuPage. Tests all FAQ interactions and navigation flows.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: While this test case does not explicitly test FAQs, this method validates the Print and Payment History page structure and navigation, which provides context for the page where the billing cycle period card is located.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Verifies that a specific notification text appears in the print history table. Creates a PrintHistoryPage instance. Checks if the print_history_table is hidden and expands it if needed. Gets the inner text of the print_history_table and asserts that the notifications_text parameter is contained in the table content.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Steps 5 and 9 verify that plan pause information and complimentary pages information messages are displayed. This method can verify notification text in the print history table, which may include pause plan information.

matched_methods.method_signature:
@staticmethod
def verify_plan_info(page, plan_value: str, plan_pages: str)
matched_methods.what_it_does: Verifies that the plan information on the print history page shows the expected price and page count. Creates a PrintHistoryPage instance. Uses expect() to verify the print_history_card is visible. Gets the text content of the plan_price_text element. Extracts numbers and asserts that the first number matches plan_value and the second matches plan_pages.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Steps 8 and 9 verify complimentary pages value and information message which include plan details. This method verifies plan information including page counts, which is relevant for validating the pause plan page allocation (10 complimentary pages).

matched_methods.what_it_does: Verifies that the current total value on the print history page matches the expected value. Creates a PrintHistoryPage instance. Uses expect() to verify the print_history_card is visible. Gets the text content of the first current_total_text element. Extracts numbers and asserts that the first number matches the expected total_value.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: While not explicitly mentioned in the test steps, verifying the current total is part of billing cycle period card validation and may be useful for comprehensive billing data verification.

matched_helpers.what_it_does: Comprehensive helper module for print history page operations including verifying billing cycle periods, selecting billing cycle options, verifying billing table data, normalizing and validating currency values, verifying billing section details with expected values, validating all billing cycles data, validating FAQ links and navigation, validating no-pens print history page, downloading all invoices, verifying notifications, verifying plan information, and verifying current total values.
matched_helpers.relevance_reason: This helper provides comprehensive methods for Print and Payment History page operations, which is the primary page being tested in this test case. It includes methods for verifying billing cycle periods, billing table data, page counts, and plan information - all of which are core to testing the Billing Cycle Period card.

test_case_mappings.batch_coverage_summary: This batch contains helper modules for HPID authentication, landing page operations, OSS emulator operations, overview page operations, and print history page operations. The most relevant file for this test case is print_history_helper.py, which provides methods for verifying billing cycle periods, billing table data, page counts, and plan information. However, this batch does NOT contain: (1) Page object files with locators for billing cycle period card elements (progress bars, tooltips, info icons, page count text elements), (2) Navigation methods to Print and Payment History page, (3) Printer enrollment methods, (4) Subscription state setup methods, (5) Pause plan methods, (6) Time manipulation methods, (7) Print job simulation methods, (8) Page refresh methods, (9) Progress bar color verification methods, (10) Tooltip interaction methods, (11) Visual regression testing methods, (12) Responsive testing methods. These components likely exist in other batches containing page object files, dashboard navigation helpers, enrollment helpers, subscription helpers, plan management helpers, test utilities, API helpers, and visual testing utilities.
